typing.slogan: Looks like work. Feels like play.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No scores yet — be the first!

models.title: Models
models.hint: Click a model to preview — supports rotation and zoom

table.name: Table
table.desc: Solid wood desk with four legs

chair.name: Chair
chair.desc: Wooden chair with double crossbar backrest

monitor.name: Monitor
monitor.desc: Widescreen monitor with neck support and stand

game.title: MECH DEFENDER
game.subtitle: Type to destroy — defend the core
game.desc1: Destroy all invading mech units and protect the center core
game.desc2: Type the text above enemies to eliminate them
game.startHint: Press Enter or Space to start
game.upgradeHint: Type A / B / C or click to select
game.retryHint: Press Enter / Space to return to menu
game.victoryMsg: All invading mechs have been destroyed!

piercing.name: Piercing Shot
piercing.desc: Bullets continue after hit, piercing multiple enemies

chainExplosion.name: Chain Explosion
chainExplosion.desc: Killing an enemy deals 1 damage to all within 50px

rapidFire.name: Rapid Fire
rapidFire.desc: Turret animation 30% faster, improving output rhythm

autoTurret.name: Auto Turret
autoTurret.desc: Automatically eliminates the nearest enemy every 10s

wordReveal.name: Word Alert
wordReveal.desc: Highlights full pinyin hint when an enemy appears

critBonus.name: Critical Hit
critBonus.desc: 5 consecutive perfect kills instantly destroys the next enemy

areaBomb.name: Area Bomb
areaBomb.desc: Press Tab to deal 1 damage to all enemies within 220px of center, 30s cooldown

wordFreeze.name: Word Freeze
wordFreeze.desc: 30% chance to freeze nearby enemies within 100px for 1.5s on kill

scoreSurge.name: Score Surge
scoreSurge.desc: After 8 consecutive kills, the next 5 kills score ×3
